questionHtml: Predict, giving a reason, the effect of increasing temperature on the stability of copper(I) chloride solution.
markschemeHtml:
TΔS more negative «reducing spontaneity» AND stability increases ✔

NOTE: Accept calculation showing non-spontaneity at 433 K.

meta.title: Predict, giving a reason, the effect of increasing temperature on the stability of copper(I) chloride solution.
